**Title** *(one sentence — be specific)*
> e.g. "Login button unresponsive on Safari 17 when 2FA is enabled"

**Severity**
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — app unusable
- [ ] 🟠 High — major feature broken
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic / minor

---

### Steps to reproduce *(required)*
1. 
2. 
3. 

> Tip: include specific data values, user states, or feature flags if relevant.

### Expected behavior
*What should happen:*

### Actual behavior
*What happens instead:*

---

### Environment *(required)*
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS & version | e.g. macOS 14.4 / iOS 17 |
| Browser & version | e.g. Chrome 124 / Safari 17 |
| App version | e.g. v3.2.1 or commit SHA |
| Device (mobile only) | e.g. iPhone 15 Pro |

### Reproducibility
- [ ] Always (100%)
- [ ] Often (>50%)
- [ ] Sometimes (10–50%)
- [ ] Rarely (<10%)
- [ ] Couldn't reproduce again

---

### Screenshots / logs *(optional)*
*Attach screenshots, recordings, or paste console errors / stack traces here.*

### Additional context *(optional)*
*Workarounds found, related issues, recent changes that may be relevant.*
